Container.Name: Moodarr
Container.Overview: Open-source Plex + Seerr companion app for natural-language discovery and explicit request creation.

Config.Name: Appdata
Config.Description: Persistent SQLite database, cached config, and runtime state.

Config.Name: Admin Token
Config.Description: Long random token required for admin writes and request creation when admin auth is enabled.

Config.Name: Require Admin Token
Config.Description: Require the admin token for protected actions.

Config.Name: Plex Base URL
Config.Description: Base URL reachable from the Moodarr container, for example http://plex:32400.

Config.Name: Plex Web URL
Config.Description: Plex Web base URL used for Open in Plex links.

Config.Name: Seerr Base URL
Config.Description: Overseerr/Jellyseerr-compatible base URL reachable from the Moodarr container.

Config.Name: Seerr API Key
Config.Description: Seerr/Jellyseerr API key. Stored server-side only.

Config.Name: AI Provider
Config.Description: Use none for deterministic ranking or openai for server-side reranking.

Config.Name: Sync Interval Minutes
Config.Description: Set to 0 to disable scheduled sync.

Config.Name: Sync Seerr
Config.Description: Sync Seerr request/media status during scheduled sync.
